top_signals.title: Correspondence: DAO 05/26 Service Level Costing
top_signals.summary: ‘Dear Accounting Officer’ letters provide advice on accountability, regularity, propriety, value for money and annual accounting exercises.

top_signals.title: As Europe rearms, ‘wingman’ aircraft take center stage
top_signals.summary: European and U.S. defense forces are rapidly developing their own AI-powered drones to complement their fighter jets and carry extra battlefield tech.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
